Displays a dialog to indicate a language change.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that declares a single function, [`language_ui_display_changed`](<#language_ui_display_changed>). The function takes a constant character pointer `lang_name` as an argument. Its purpose is to show a dialog indicating that the language has changed. The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
